title: Bridge Essay: Coupling Inner and Outer Body for Self-Consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Coupling, Inner, and, Outer, Body.

**Coupling Inner and Outer Body for Self-Consciousness.** — Trends Cogn Sci. PMID: 30826212. DOI: 10.1016/j.tics.2019.02.002. Although recent studies on self-consciousness emphasized the importance of bodily processing and multisensory integration, such research has focused solely on bodily signals originating from the outside of the body (i.e., exteroceptive bodily signals) or internal bodily signals from visceral organs (i.e., interoceptive bodily signals) and how each system contributes to self-consciousness, without much interaction between the two approaches.
